operations.title: Search Project Context
operations.summary: Search bounded GitLab project issues and merge requests without exposing raw project tools.

inputs.name: namespace
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for namespace when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: project
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for project when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: query
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for query when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: limit
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for limit when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: backend_options
inputs.summary: Bounded GitLab provider options such as selected fields or pagination. Must not bypass project scope, approval, protected refs, or secret policy.
inputs.clarification_hint: Do not ask for backend_options unless the user explicitly needs provider-specific controls.
